key_metrics: Diluted EPS of $2.07, up 32.7% YoY from $1.56
Gross margin expanded to 58.8% from 57.3% YoY
Operating income of $472.3 million, up 38.1% YoY
qoq_changes: Revenue increased approximately 18.2% sequentially based on implied Q1 2025 revenue of $1.54 billion
Net income increased approximately 20.5% sequentially based on implied Q1 2025 net income of $332.8 million
Inventories increased to $1.79 billion from $1.47 billion at the end of FY2024
new_risks: Specific MD&A risk disclosures were omitted from the provided text, but a notable $314 million YTD increase in inventory warrants monitoring for potential obsolescence or demand mismatch if second-half sales falter.
management_tone: Bullish, as evidenced by robust 20%+ top-line growth, significant gross and operating margin expansion, and strong bottom-line execution.
analyst_note: Garmin delivered an exceptionally strong Q2 2025, highlighted by 20.4% revenue growth and a 38.1% surge in operating income, demonstrating excellent operating leverage. The substantial YTD inventory build suggests management is preparing for strong second-half demand, making sell-through execution a key metric to watch.
